meaning: n.天然磁石,吸引人的东西
examples: Love is the lodestone of life.
A kindly tongue is the lodestone of the hearts of men.
But the lodestone of distant horizons beckoned once again.
Thanks to Lodestone, Infy added 89 clients, including 36 clients from Lodestone last quarter.
The expectations that we self create often become the lodestone of disappointment and failure, weighing us down and detracting from fulfillment.
